module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with typed configuration, directional chat request/response envelopes and segments, centralized external-library namespaces, remoc-backed session/task endpoints, explicit public/private Rust section markers where private implementation details exist, and a first minimal single-request loop-engine runtime whose engine-owned task contexts store direct shared task/status/runtime-event fields.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft split into CLI and a remoc-backed core client session endpoint with streamed response segment receives.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for a minimal loop engine runtime with direct task-context state fields, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, streamed chat response segments, model backend selection, and model backend implementations.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration with fallible loading, directional chat request messages and response segments, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
